race.comment: Looks a wide open affair. DREAMWRITER (5) got a well-deserved win at Toowoomba last time out and will have derived a stack of confidence from that victory. Rider Butler was in the stirrups on that occasion and sticks here. Can go back-to-back without surprising. TREVATT COURT (8) loves it here on her home circuit with a win and two placings from three spins and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Ready to peak third-up and can make her presence felt. ULUWATU (2) strips fitter second-up, draws the inside alley and gets 2kg off with the claim. Ticks a few boxes. IN GREAT SPIRIT (9) next best despite the sticky draw.
